title: LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 SQL Injection Exploited within 36 Hours of Disclosure
summary: In yet another instance of threat actors quickly jumping on the exploitation bandwagon, a newly disclosed critical security flaw in BerriAI's LiteLLM Python package has come under active exploitation in the wild within 36 hours of the bug becoming public knowledge.
